title: RAD-TUI: VB1 for MS-DOS on Linux - Update & Porting Plan
instructions: Modernize and enhance the RAD-TUI visual IDE to bring more VB1-for-MS-DOS functionality to Linux. Focus on feature parity, cross-compatibility between Python and FreeBASIC implementations, and adding missing classic VB features.

1783669453.971711.instruction:
Compare Python (rad-tui-py.py) and FreeBASIC (rad-tui-BASIC.bas) implementations. Document:
- Features present in Python but missing in FreeBASIC (save/load, code editor, runtime)
- Features missing from both vs original VB1 for MS-DOS
- Code architecture differences
- Create a feature parity matrix

1783669453.9718366.instruction:
Create an enhanced JSON project format that supports:
- Multiple forms/windows per project
- Menu definitions
- Event handlers beyond on_click (on_change, on_focus, on_blur, on_timer)
- Control-specific properties (min/max for scrollbars, items for list boxes)
- Version field for backward compatibility
Document the schema

1783669453.973003.instruction:
Add Save Project and Load Project functionality to rad-tui-BASIC.bas:
- JSON serialization/deserialization
- File dialog using input prompts
- Error handling for file I/O
- Ensure compatibility with Python-generated JSON files

1783669453.973197.instruction:
Implement code-behind editor in FreeBASIC:
- Modal text editor for writing event handlers
- Store code in control data structure
- Basic FreeBASIC syntax highlighting (optional)
- Integration with double-click on buttons

1783669453.9733784.instruction:
Add RUN mode to FreeBASIC implementation:
- Execute FreeBASIC code snippets (or interpret simple logic)
- Event dispatch system (on_click handlers)
- msgbox function implementation
- Control property access at runtime
- Return to design mode capability

1783669453.9735265.instruction:
Implement Check Box (type 1) and Option Button (type 11):
- Visual rendering in both Python and FreeBASIC
- Property editing (checked state for checkboxes, group for option buttons)
- Runtime behavior
- Update tool palette activation

1783669453.9736233.instruction:
Implement Frame (type 7) container control:
- Border rendering with optional caption
- Child control containment (clip to frame bounds)
- Visual grouping in property editor
- Z-order handling

1783669453.9737234.instruction:
Implement List Box (type 10) and Combo Box (type 2):
- Items collection property
- Scrollbar integration
- Selection handling
- Runtime item manipulation

1783669453.9738245.instruction:
Add menu bar designer functionality:
- Menu editor modal/dialog
- Menu items with captions and names
- Nested submenus
- Runtime menu display and event handling
- Save/load menu structure in project file

1783669453.9739432.instruction:
Expand event system beyond on_click:
- on_change for text boxes
- on_focus/on_blur for focus changes
- on_timer for timer control
- on_load for form initialization
Update code templates and runtime dispatcher

1783669453.9740608.instruction:
Develop comprehensive example projects:
- Hello World (basic)
- Calculator (buttons, text boxes, math)
- Text Editor (multi-line text, menus, file I/O)
- Database Browser (list boxes, data binding simulation)
- Timer Demo (timer events, animations)
Place in examples/ directory

1783669453.9741776.instruction:
Create documentation:
- API reference for all controls and properties
- Event handling guide
- Project file format specification
- Porting guide (VB1 DOS to RAD-TUI)
- Tutorial: Building Your First Application
- Update HISTORY.md with changes

1783669453.9742963.instruction:
Test and fix issues:
- Test on multiple terminal emulators (xterm, gnome-terminal, konsole, alacritty)
- Verify mouse handling consistency
- Fix UTF-8 box drawing issues
- Test project file interchange between Python/FreeBASIC
- Performance optimization
